entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.openecomp.org/job/aai-logging-service-master-verify-java/1/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.openecomp.cl:eelf-logging:jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.openecomp.aai:common-logging:jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.openecomp.org/job/aai-logging-service-master-verify-java/1/ )
